The migration is complete. Let me provide a summary of all the changes made:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. Bumped AndroidX Activity version (gradle/libs.versions.toml)
- Changed `androidxActivity` from `1.9.3` to `1.10.1`

### 2. Updated LocalActivity.kt (core/ui/compose/common/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/core/ui/compose/common/activity/LocalActivity.kt)
- Removed the custom `LocalActivity` definition (`staticCompositionLocalOf`)
- Simplified `setActivityContent` function - it now just delegates to `setContent` since the official `LocalActivity` is automatically provided by AndroidX Activity 1.10.1

### 3. Updated imports in 7 files to use the official `LocalActivity`:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `feature/account/server/settings/.../TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |
| `feature/account/server/settings/.../ClientCertificateInput.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |
| `feature/launcher/.../FeatureLauncherApp.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |
| `feature/launcher/.../FeatureLauncherNavHost.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |
| `feature/funding/googleplay/.../ContributionScreen.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |
| `feature/settings/import/.../SettingsImportScreen.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |
| `feature/funding/googleplay/.../ContributionScreenKtTest.kt` | Changed import to `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity` |

### No changes needed for:
- **config/detekt/detekt.yml**: The `LocalActivity` entry in the allowlist is still valid since the name remains the same
- **Activities using `setActivityContent`**: These continue to work because `setActivityContent` now simply delegates to `setContent`, and the official `LocalActivity` is automatically provided by AndroidX Activity 1.10.1
- **Dependency classpath files**: These will be automatically updated when running `./gradlew dependencyGuard`
